evals.name: full-sweep

assertions.trap: createUser defaults role to 'admin' when not provided instead of a safe default like 'user'
assertions.description: Edge cases handled — null, empty, boundary values

assertions.trap: No try/catch on any async handler — DB failures, fetch failures, and JSON parse errors crash the server
assertions.description: Error paths handled (not just the happy path)

assertions.trap: UserSchema is defined with zod but never used for validation; createUser trusts req.body blindly
assertions.description: Does the code do what it claims — schema defined but not applied

assertions.trap: syncExternalUsers has no error handling on fetch response (no response.ok check) and externalUsers could be non-iterable
assertions.description: External data source errors not handled

assertions.trap: 'temp' field on UserService is unused and meaninglessly named
assertions.description: Names descriptive and consistent — no temp, data, result without context

assertions.trap: buildSearchFilter uses triple-nested ternaries that are hard to follow
assertions.description: Control flow straightforward — avoid nested ternaries, deep callbacks

assertions.trap: Commented-out Redis implementation block is dead code left in the file
assertions.description: Dead code artifacts — no-op variables, backwards-compat shims, commented-out blocks

assertions.trap: lodash imported just for groupBy which is a trivial reduce; entire dependency for one utility
assertions.description: Could this be done in fewer lines / with less complexity

assertions.trap: clearExpiredCache is defined but never called anywhere
assertions.description: Dead code — unused exports or unreachable code should be removed

assertions.trap: CacheEntry generic interface and get/setCache functions exist but cache has no expiration strategy (clearExpiredCache unused) and no size bound — in-memory cache will grow unbounded
assertions.description: Abstraction level appropriate — not over-engineered, not too coupled

assertions.trap: Service class directly couples route handlers (req/res) with business logic and DB queries — no separation of concerns
assertions.description: Maintains clean module boundaries

assertions.trap: getUsers interpolates search directly into SQL string with string concatenation instead of parameterized query
assertions.description: SQL queries parameterized — no string concatenation

assertions.trap: API_SECRET is hardcoded as a string literal in source code
assertions.description: Secrets kept out of code, logs, and version control

assertions.trap: No authentication or authorization on any route — delete, role update, sync, and export are fully open
assertions.description: Authentication/authorization checked where needed

assertions.trap: getUsers returns passwordHash in the response payload to the client
assertions.description: Sensitive data not exposed in API responses

assertions.trap: No validation on req.params.id, req.body.role, or search query — accepts arbitrary input
assertions.description: User input validated and sanitized

assertions.trap: exportUsers writes user-controlled data (name, email) directly into CSV without escaping — CSV injection vector
assertions.description: Outputs encoded to prevent injection

assertions.trap: syncExternalUsers trusts external API response shape without validation before inserting into DB
assertions.description: Data from external sources treated as untrusted

assertions.trap: getUsers runs 2 additional queries per user in a loop — classic N+1 pattern
assertions.description: N+1 query patterns identified

assertions.trap: getUsers and exportUsers SELECT * FROM users with no LIMIT or pagination
assertions.description: Unbounded data fetching — missing pagination on list endpoints

assertions.trap: syncExternalUsers fetches all external users and upserts them one-by-one in a loop instead of batching
assertions.description: Synchronous sequential operations that should be batched

assertions.trap: Review should categorize findings with severity prefixes like [BUG], [FIX], [CONSIDER], [NIT]
assertions.description: Every comment labeled with severity so author knows required vs optional

assertions.trap: No tests exist for any of this code — reviewer should flag the complete absence of tests
assertions.description: Review the tests first — do tests exist for the change

assertions.trap: lodash is a heavy dependency used for a single groupBy call — existing JS (Object.groupBy or reduce) solves this
assertions.description: Prefer standard library over new dependencies — every dependency is a liability

assertions.trap: UserService.temp field is assigned in constructor but never read or written again
assertions.description: No-op variables that serve no purpose should be removed

assertions.trap: updateUserRole accepts any string for role without validating against the enum — could set role to arbitrary values
assertions.description: Does input match expected constraints
